child_geo_events.name: Evacuation Shelter - Fulton Convention Center

data.information: An evacuation shelter is set up at Fulton Convention Center located at 402 N Fulton Beach Rd, Fulton, TX 78358, per Rockport Public Safety Communications. Red Cross is on site with food and water. Pets can also be brought to the evacuation shelter.

child_geo_events.name: Animal Shelter - Aransas County Animal Care Services

data.information:
Any evacuated pets can be brought to the evacuation shelter or at Aransas County Animal Care Services at 872 Airport Rd, Rockport, TX 78382, per Rockport Public Safety Center on Facebook.

For animals brought to Aransas County Animal Care Services that are not dogs or cats, please bring containments for them per their Facebook page. Call 361-790-0151 if you need assistance.
